network_summary: Family Dental Care PC is an 8-location privately owned dental group founded in 1986 by Dr. Alexander G. Alemis, serving the Chicago Southland and NW Indiana. Harry Varvaressos is the Executive Director (non-dentist administrator) of the Calumet City and Evergreen Park locations — he is an AO for administrative/operational purposes, not the owner. The owner-operator is Dr. Alemis. The group operates under a management company layer (Upstat Dental Solutions LTD), which is the MSO/management-services entity. No PE backing found; explicitly self-describes as 'the largest, privately owned dental group in Chicago.'
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Alexander G. Alemis DDS FAGD, founder and CEO of Family Dental Care PC since 1986; Harry Varvaressos is Executive Director (administrator), not the owner.
brand_trade_names: Family Dental Care of Calumet City
Family Dental Care of Evergreen Park

Upstat Dental Solutions LTD (management company / MSO, 3009 E 92nd St, Chicago IL — PPP loan recipient)

EIN 363170189 on flagship South Chicago (NPI 1578772299, AO=Alex Alemis Owner)
Harry Varvaressos listed as 'Executive Director' (NPPES authorized official) on both watched-IL GP locations
Upstat Dental Solutions LTD confirmed as management/MSO entity at 3009 E 92nd St, Chicago (SBA PPP record)
Family Dental Care website (familydentalcare.com) shows 8 locations including exact addresses for Calumet City and Evergreen Park
mso_platform_pe_evidence: Upstat Dental Solutions LTD is the management company (MSO layer) that operates the Family Dental Care Group according to familydentalcare.com/alexander-alemis/ and search results. SBA PPP record at federalpay.org/paycheck-protection-program/upstat-dental-solutions-ltd-chicago-il confirms the entity. Family Dental Care explicitly self-describes as 'the largest, privately owned dental group in Chicago' — no PE sponsor found. pe_backed=false.
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: Harry Varvaressos is an Executive Director / administrator, not the owner of this network. His AO reach (Calumet City + Evergreen Park) is an administrative cluster signal, not an ownership signal. The true owner is Dr. Alexander Alemis. The network is a real branded DSO (Family Dental Care, 8 locations, MSO layer) — classification should be branded_dso, not dentist_multi.
evidence_chain: AO signal: HARRY VARVARESSOS listed as 'EX DIRECTOR' / 'EXEC DIRECTOR' on NPPES for NPI 1427268051 (Calumet City, ZIP 60409) and NPI 1083824643 (Evergreen Park, ZIP 60805). Documentary corroboration: (1) familydentalcare.com lists both addresses as active Family Dental Care locations in an 8-location network; (2) familydentalcare.com/alexander-alemis/ identifies Dr. Alex Alemis as founder/CEO and names Upstat Dental Solutions as the management company; (3) SBA PPP record confirms Upstat Dental Solutions LTD as a legal entity at 3009 E 92nd St Chicago; (4) NPPES records show Dr. Alex Alemis listed as 'OWNER' on the flagship 3009 E 92nd St NPI (1578772299), same network. No PE sponsor found; self-described as privately owned.
future_app_notes: 1. Two other Family Dental Care locations (South Chicago 60617, East Side Chicago 60617) are in watched ZIPs but may not be in this AO cluster — the AO cluster captured only Varvaressos's two ZIPs. Confirm whether those locations are classified corporate. 2. Upstat Dental Solutions LTD should be logged as the MSO entity for this network. 3. EIN 363554595 is shared across East Side and Evergreen Park — worth checking if any other locations share this EIN. 4. Harry Varvaressos also appears on East Side Chicago NPI 1902016520 (slightly different spelling 'VARVARESSO') — this may be a third location tied to him administratively.
